summary: Validated Educação Infantil multi-select Campo de Experiência feature on Learning Objects page - ALL 11 TESTS PASSED. The feature correctly shows multi-select for infantil classes and simple select for non-infantil classes.

integration_issues.issue: WebSocket closes before connection established - transient issue in test environment

critical_code_review_comments: LearningObjects.js correctly detects infantil class via nivel_ensino === 'educacao_infantil'
Click outside handler properly implemented using useRef and mousedown event
'Todos' checkbox correctly selects/deselects all campos de experiência
Calendar and form correctly show when campos are selected
Record badge shows campo name for infantil with multiple campos selected
Switching turmas correctly toggles between multi-select and simple select
seed_data_creation: Created one test record for PRE-ESCOLA I on 10/03/2026 with content TEST_INFANTIL_CONTENT_* and campo CORPO, GESTOS E MOVIMENTOS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Educação Infantil multi-select Campo de Experiência feature is fully validated. PRE-ESCOLA I (id: 2df28f9e-1b80-4bbb-828a-d5a477639854) is the infantil class with 5 campos. TURMA MULTI 1-2-3 (id: c09b8666-c8bb-40d1-b835-c2b0fa4b8ecd) is a non-infantil class for comparison testing.

verified_features.test_01_non_infantil_simple_select: PASS - TURMA MULTI 1-2-3 shows 'Componente Curricular *' with simple <select>
verified_features.test_02_infantil_multiselect_button: PASS - PRE-ESCOLA I shows 'Campo de experiência *' with multi-select button
verified_features.test_03_dropdown_content: PASS - Dropdown shows 'Todos' + 5 campos (CORPO GESTOS E MOVIMENTOS, ESCUTA FALA PENSAMENTO E IMAGINAÇÃO, ESPAÇOS TEMPOS QUANTIDADES RELAÇÕES E TRANSFORMAÇÕES, O EU O OUTRO E O NÓS, TRAÇOS SONS CORES E FORMAS)
verified_features.test_04_select_todos: PASS - Checking 'Todos' selects all items, button shows 'Todos'
verified_features.test_05_deselect_todos: PASS - Unchecking 'Todos' deselects all items, button shows 'Selecione'
verified_features.test_06_select_individual: PASS - Selecting 2 items shows '2 selecionado(s)', calendar appears
verified_features.test_07_calendar_day_click_form: PASS - Clicking calendar day shows form with 'Campo de Experiência *' dropdown (data-testid='form-campo-experiencia-select')
verified_features.test_08_fill_and_save: PASS - Form saves successfully with success message 'Registro criado com sucesso!'
verified_features.test_09_record_in_list: PASS - Record appears in 'Registros do Mês' with purple badge showing campo name
verified_features.test_10_switch_to_non_infantil: PASS - Switching to TURMA MULTI 1-2-3 returns to simple select
verified_features.test_11_click_outside_closes_dropdown: PASS - Clicking outside closes the multi-select dropdown
